textByHash.151a9331a8873809ed9310f58a7a5c5cacf3bee7: The Yellow Fortune! We are the grandest of the mining companies that make up the Consortium!
textByHash.1fd2a6f17fc3619887c72f4c416feba6862f4d29: The Yellow Fortune does not employ the services of men.
textByHash.30201a56b709e1317225f8158f7823279e92ea41: This is the official residence of the Yellow Fortune.
textByHash.4b8403ad2cf7df506daeec04d3bb5eda8bd29d49: What did you need of the Yellow Fortune?
textByHash.67251bf14bca94c19c65377279336a931e237cd3: See those traders out there, just out the door? They're all standing in the Trade Octagon. There's an awful lot of trade going on in the palace, you know.
textByHash.7d1db62e3f8e0bb23c31071f5d2090259b1e739c: And what can I do for you?
textByHash.98eae9878bae196fa8e594b59d0d1fde24db3409: We simply consider men to be weak and inferior.
textByHash.a144cc2f4bf59221bd4a195df6a32925ed9c6d50: Can I help you with anything?
textByHash.af764ec68bf75589897ea6c7356ad51d1eac26df: I am the head secretary of the Yellow Fortune.
textByHash.b73e74c5f3ee7c3881606172ad4fae8fa3e7bf9f: Why, you are in the headquarters of the Yellow Fortune.
textByHash.b949cb039b57a94ec94af330e0bc713dc1751314: We often find that they are too weak or too slow to be of sufficient use.
textByHash.c51b2d37f0a6f2d9dc26f7e8c90c8c60e81711da: We share this floor of the palace with the other companies of the Consortium. And trade with them on the Trade Octagon.
textByHash.cfba808722d8fe3a6fdb91c83123f4a57c1329db: These are the offices of the Yellow Fortune.
textByHash.e7f30f16847399156a16e4272b7e5d8798303bd9: Why, because men are not allowed to work in our company, of course!
textByHash.f81408ee00fdfa74cf53a4b5d5724e2b4b7f7848: Is there anything you need assistance with?
textByHash.f8dc2382a8cd9440b32b9bfa009880fe6ae4d9ce: What can I do for you, human?
textByHash.ffab49546a46af2d1e82185d63b73d402ff57cd6: You will have to find that out on your own, I'm afraid. I do have more work to do.
